content: Phase 1: POC - Get integration playbook for Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key
Phase 1: POC - Research and validate 8 free OSINT/data adapter endpoints
Phase 1: POC - Build single Python script testing all 8 adapters + Claude correlation
Phase 1: POC - Run POC script and fix until all adapters + correlation work (8/8 PASS, Claude correlation working)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Build backend (FastAPI) - adapter modules, sweep service, AI correlate, auth, caching
Phase 2: Build frontend (React) - terminal UI, 2D map + 3D globe, AXE chat widget, 55 spinners
Phase 2: Fix all bugs from testing
